phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il binario per le Cinque Terre, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH il bee-NAH-ryoh per le CHEEN-kweh TER-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Binari uno o due, lato mare.
likely_response.pronunciation: bee-NAH-ree OO-noh OH DOO-eh LAH-toh MAH-reh
likely_response.translation_en: Tracks one or two, sea side.

responses.english: Tracks one or two, sea side.
responses.phonetic: bee-NAH-ree OO-noh OH DOO-eh LAH-toh MAH-reh
responses.local: Binari uno o due, lato mare.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora parte il prossimo treno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-ra PAR-teh il PROS-see-moh TREH-no, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto per Riomaggiore, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-ta il bee-LYET-toh per ree-oh-mah-JO-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si lascia il bagaglio in stazione, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-veh see LAH-sha il ba-GA-lyo in sta-TSYO-neh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Quanto costa usare i depositi bagagli?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAN-to KOS-ta oo-ZA-reh ee deh-POH-zee-tee ba-GAL-yee
